July 11, 2024 
Clinical Treatment of Gonorrhea 
At a glance 
There is currently only one recommended treatment for uncomplicated gonorrhea. 
Expedited Partner Therapy (EPT) is a partner treatment approach where sex partners of patients who test positive for certain sexually transmitted diseases are provided treatment without previous me
